channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vance warns Iran that 'another option on the table' if nuclear deal not reached
item.description: Vice President JD Vance warned Iran that there is "another option on the table" if nuclear deal talks fail, citing President Donald Trump's threats.

item.title: Bondi faces grilling in House Judiciary Committee hearing over Epstein files, weaponization allegations
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi testifies Wednesday before the House Judiciary Committee, where lawmakers are expected to confront her over the DOJ's handl...

item.title: Utah Gov. Cox to Olympic Media: I 'Hate' Political Questions for Athletes
item.description: Utah Gov. Spencer Cox pushed back on political questions at the 2026 Winter Olympics after reporters pressed him about President Donald Trump's recent...

item.title: 'GOP' House candidate admits she's actually a progressive in viral video: 'Telling people the truth'
item.description: A candidate for Congress hoping to represent North Carolina's 14th district, Kate Barr, says she is running as a Republican because it is the only pat...

item.title: Mexican cartel drones breach US airspace, are disabled by War Department, Duffy says
item.description: The U.S. military disabled Mexican cartel drones breached American airspace near El Paso, Texas, federal aviation officials announced Wednesday.

item.title: Trump: WH Ballroom Construction 'Ahead of Schedule'
item.description: The White House ballroom construction is "on budget, and ahead of schedule," President Donald Trump said while sharing two views of the hall.

item.title: Morning Minute: The Curse of Interesting - Okay, Downright Strange - Times
El Paso Air Closure Tied to Mexican Drug Cartel Drones Breaching US AirspaceâWar Dept Took Invaders Down
Dems' Call for Arrest Warrants Could Cripple ICE
item.description: Democrats' call for judicial warrants before arresting illegal aliens would reportedly severely hinder Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) opera...

item.title: Pritzker joins chorus of Dem governors boycotting White House dinner after snub ignites 'chaos'
item.description: Democratic governors blasted President Trump over disinviting two of their colleagues to a traditionally bipartisan event, leading to a growing chorus...

item.title: Qatar Emir, Trump Discuss Regional De-Escalation
item.description: Qatar's Emir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad al-Thani and President Donald Trump discussed in a phone call efforts for regional de-escalation and stability, th...

item.title: Kentucky Gov. Uses Bible As Support for Mutilating Children
USDA Launches Vital Farm Security Plan to Shield American Farmland From Foreign Buyers
Colony Ridge in Texas Agrees to $68 Million Settlement, Adds Immigration ID Requirements
Sen. Graham: Trump Vow to Aid Iranians 'More Real by the Day'
item.description: President Donald Trump's vow that Washington would come to the aid of the Iranian people "is becoming more real by the day," Sen. Lindsey Graham, R-S....
